import { refines, spec, specId, verifies } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// Declares verifies(parent) but no test anchor backs it anywhere in the corpus: not an enabled
// verifier, so the declared edge confers nothing (binding, never liveness — MD-7).
export const declaredOnlyExampleSpec = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.unverified-parent.example"),
  title: "Example without a test binding",
  kind: "example",
  altitude: "story",
  readiness: "idea",
  intent: { outcome: "Show a declared verifies edge conferring no delivery fact." },
  relations: [
    refines(specId("spec:orders.unverified-parent")),
    verifies(specId("spec:orders.unverified-parent")),
  ],
});
